title: frangula alnus subsp. baetica
intro: Frangula alnus subsp. baetica, also known as Baetic alder buckthorn, is a subspecies of the alder buckthorn plant that is native to southern Europe and north Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthraquinone compounds which have laxative and astringent effects. The health benefits of Frangula alnus subsp. baetica include relief from constipation, inflammation, and skin issues, as well as its potential to support liver and gallbladder function. Frangula alnus subsp. baetica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support digestive health and promote overall well-being.
